ddls:
CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "care_site_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the care site where the person receives primary care */,
  "day_of_birth" INTEGER /* The day of the month of the person's birth */,
  "month_of_birth" INTEGER /* The month of the person's birth */,
  "year_of_birth" INTEGER /* The year of the person's birth */,
  "ethnicity_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the standard concept identifier for the person's ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_source_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the source concept identifier for the person's ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_source_value" TEXT /* Source code for the person's ethnicity as it appears in the source data */,
  "race_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the standard concept identifier for the person's race */,
  "race_source_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the source concept identifier for the person's race */,
  "race_source_value" TEXT /* Source code for the person's race as it appears in the source data */,
  "gender_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the standard concept identifier for the person's gender */,
  "gender_source_concept_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the source concept identifier for the person's gender */,
  "gender_source_value" TEXT /* Source code for the person's gender as it appears in the source data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_gender_source_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_source_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_care_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("care_site_id") REFERENCES care_sites ("care_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_ethnicity_source_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_source_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_race_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_gender_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_race_source_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_source_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_ethnicity_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "care_sites" (
  "care_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each care site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the care site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the care site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the care site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the care site */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the care site is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the care site is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the care site */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the care site */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the care site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("care_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the concept */,
  "concept_description" TEXT /* Description of the concept */,
  "domain_id" TEXT /* Domain of the concept */,
  "vocabulary_id" TEXT /* Vocabulary of the concept */,
  "concept_class_id" TEXT /* Class of the concept */,
  "standard_concept" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the concept is standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_relationships" (
  "concept_relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept relationship */,
  "concept_id_1" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the first concept in the relationship */,
  "concept_id_2" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the second concept in the relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship between the concepts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_relationships_concept_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id_1") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_relationships_concept_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id_2") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, admin, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person whose record is being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person whose record this is */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time when the record was created */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., medical history, medication list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record content */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that this content belongs to */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, image) */,
  "content_value" TEXT /* Value of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_contents_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("record_id")
)
